description: substitute replaces each letter a-z with key[ord(c) - 97] and leaves spaces/other characters unchanged
invert_key places ALPHA[i] into the slot named by key[i], producing a key that undoes the original
unsubstitute decrypts by substituting with invert_key(key), so decrypt(encrypt(msg)) returns the original
Reuses substitute and invert_key, clear names, a return on every function
